prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 59.4 kg; Height 166.6 cm; BMI 21.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 212mg/dL; 9 months ago 201mg/dL; 6 months ago 210mg/dL; 3 months ago 224mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.2kg; 9 months ago 61.9kg; 6 months ago 57.8kg; 3 months ago 58.7kg; current 59.4kg), Height (12 months ago 166.6cm; 9 months ago 166.6cm; 6 months ago 166.6cm; 3 months ago 166.6cm; current 166.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 779mg/g; 9 months ago 642mg/g; 6 months ago 942mg/g; 3 months ago 1024mg/g; current 909mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 131mg/dL; 6 months ago 148mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.2g/dL; 9 months ago 12.6g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 12.7g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.46 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
